---
title: "Attribution Models: Same Journey, Different Conclusions"
subtitle: "Which Channel Actually Drove the Sale?"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    fontsize: 1.8em
    margin: 0.08
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---



## The Problem {background-color="#F4F4F4"}
```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:flex-start; gap:16px; margin-top:2em;">
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div style="width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%;background:#1877F2;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5em;">📘</div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.8em;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">Facebook Ad</div>
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:2.5em;color:#aaa;margin-top:50px;">→</div>
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div style="width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%;background:#EA4335;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5em;">🔍</div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.8em;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">Google Search</div>
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:2.5em;color:#aaa;margin-top:50px;">→</div>
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div style="width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%;background:#34A853;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5em;">📧</div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.8em;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">Email Click</div>
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:2.5em;color:#aaa;margin-top:50px;">→</div>
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div style="width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%;background:#F4A700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5em;">💰</div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.8em;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">Purchase</div>
  </div>
</div>
```
::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 1.1em; color: #1a3a6b;"}
Who gets the credit for that conversion?
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 0.8em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #444444;"}
The answer depends entirely on which attribution model you choose.
:::

---


## 5 Attribution Models {background-color="#F4F4F4"}

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:12px; margin-top:1em; flex-wrap:wrap;">
  <div style="background:#4A90D9;border-radius:12px;padding:16px 12px;width:140px;text-align:center;color:white;">
    <div style="font-size:1.8em;">1️⃣</div>
    <div style="font-weight:bold;margin-top:8px;">First-touch</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.75em;margin-top:6px;opacity:0.9;">100% to first contact</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#E07B4F;border-radius:12px;padding:16px 12px;width:140px;text-align:center;color:white;">
    <div style="font-size:1.8em;">🏁</div>
    <div style="font-weight:bold;margin-top:8px;">Last-touch</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.75em;margin-top:6px;opacity:0.9;">100% to last contact</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#5BAD6F;border-radius:12px;padding:16px 12px;width:140px;text-align:center;color:white;">
    <div style="font-size:1.8em;">⚖️</div>
    <div style="font-weight:bold;margin-top:8px;">Linear</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.75em;margin-top:6px;opacity:0.9;">Equal split across all</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#9B72B0;border-radius:12px;padding:16px 12px;width:140px;text-align:center;color:white;">
    <div style="font-size:1.8em;">⏱️</div>
    <div style="font-weight:bold;margin-top:8px;">Time Decay</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.75em;margin-top:6px;opacity:0.9;">More credit near conversion</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#E6A817;border-radius:12px;padding:16px 12px;width:140px;text-align:center;color:white;">
    <div style="font-size:1.8em;">🔱</div>
    <div style="font-weight:bold;margin-top:8px;">Position-based</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.75em;margin-top:6px;opacity:0.9;">40% · 20% · 40%</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="margin-top:1.2em; font-size:0.85em;">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
    <div style="width:130px;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">First-touch</div>
    <div style="width:280px;height:24px;background:#4A90D9;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <div style="margin-left:8px;color:#666;">100% · 0% · 0%</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
    <div style="width:130px;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">Last-touch</div>
    <div style="width:280px;height:24px;background:#E07B4F;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <div style="margin-left:8px;color:#666;">0% · 0% · 100%</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
    <div style="width:130px;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">Linear</div>
    <div style="width:91px;height:24px;background:#5BAD6F;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <div style="width:91px;height:24px;background:#5BAD6F;border-radius:4px;margin-left:2px;"></div>
    <div style="width:91px;height:24px;background:#5BAD6F;border-radius:4px;margin-left:2px;"></div>
    <div style="margin-left:8px;color:#666;">33% · 33% · 33%</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
    <div style="width:130px;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">Time Decay</div>
    <div style="width:40px;height:24px;background:#9B72B0;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <div style="width:80px;height:24px;background:#9B72B0;border-radius:4px;margin-left:2px;opacity:0.75;"></div>
    <div style="width:160px;height:24px;background:#9B72B0;border-radius:4px;margin-left:2px;opacity:0.55;"></div>
    <div style="margin-left:8px;color:#666;">14% · 29% · 57%</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
    <div style="width:130px;font-weight:bold;color:#222;">Position-based</div>
    <div style="width:112px;height:24px;background:#E6A817;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <div style="width:56px;height:24px;background:#E6A817;border-radius:4px;margin-left:2px;opacity:0.5;"></div>
    <div style="width:112px;height:24px;background:#E6A817;border-radius:4px;margin-left:2px;"></div>
    <div style="margin-left:8px;color:#666;">40% · 20% · 40%</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;margin-left:130px;margin-top:6px;font-size:0.8em;color:#888;">
    <div style="width:93px;text-align:center;">First touch</div>
    <div style="width:93px;text-align:center;">Middle</div>
    <div style="width:93px;text-align:center;">Last touch</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {style="font-size:0.75em; color:#555555; margin-top:0.8em;"}
Same customer journey. Five different answers.
:::

---

## Visualizing the Difference {background-color="#F4F4F4"}

*One journey: Facebook → Google → Email → Purchase*

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

models = ['First-touch', 'Last-touch', 'Linear', 'Time Decay', 'Position-based']
channels = ['Facebook', 'Google', 'Email']

# Credit allocation per model
data = {
    'First-touch':     [1.00, 0.00, 0.00],
    'Last-touch':      [0.00, 0.00, 1.00],
    'Linear':          [0.33, 0.33, 0.33],
    'Time Decay':      [0.14, 0.29, 0.57],
    'Position-based':  [0.40, 0.20, 0.40],
}

x = np.arange(len(channels))
width = 0.15
colors = ['#4FC3F7', '#81C784', '#FFD54F', '#FF8A65', '#CE93D8']

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4.5))
fig.patch.set_facecolor('#1C2951')
ax.set_facecolor('#1C2951')

for i, (model, credits) in enumerate(data.items()):
    offset = (i - 2) * width
    bars = ax.bar(x + offset, credits, width, label=model, color=colors[i], alpha=0.9)

ax.set_ylabel('Credit Allocated', color='white', fontsize=12)
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(channels, color='white', fontsize=13)
ax.tick_params(colors='white')
ax.set_ylim(0, 1.1)
ax.yaxis.set_tick_params(labelcolor='white')
ax.spines[:].set_color('#555')
ax.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=9, framealpha=0.3, labelcolor='white')
ax.set_title('Credit Allocation by Model — Same Journey', color='white', fontsize=13, pad=12)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('attribution_chart.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='#1C2951')
plt.show()
```

---

## The Numbers Can Diverge Drastically {background-color="#F4F4F4"}

*Imagine 1,000 conversions across Facebook, Google, Email*

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Simulated channel-level credit (sum across all journeys)
models = ['First-touch', 'Last-touch', 'Linear', 'Time Decay', 'Position-based']
facebook = [420, 50,  280, 160, 370]
google   = [130, 120, 280, 260, 190]
email    = [50,  530, 280, 380, 240]
# remaining goes to "Other"
other    = [1000-f-g-e for f,g,e in zip(facebook,google,email)]

x = np.arange(len(models))
width = 0.55
colors_ch = ['#4FC3F7', '#81C784', '#FFD54F', '#CE93D8']

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4.5))
fig.patch.set_facecolor('#1C2951')
ax.set_facecolor('#1C2951')

b1 = ax.bar(x, facebook, width, label='Facebook', color=colors_ch[0])
b2 = ax.bar(x, google,   width, bottom=facebook, label='Google', color=colors_ch[1])
b3 = ax.bar(x, email,    width, bottom=[f+g for f,g in zip(facebook,google)], label='Email', color=colors_ch[2])

ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(models, color='white', fontsize=11)
ax.set_ylabel('Attributed Conversions (out of 1,000)', color='white', fontsize=11)
ax.tick_params(colors='white')
ax.yaxis.set_tick_params(labelcolor='white')
ax.spines[:].set_color('#555')
ax.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=10, framealpha=0.3, labelcolor='white')
ax.set_title('Same 1,000 Conversions — Very Different Channel Credit', color='white', fontsize=13, pad=12)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('channel_chart.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='#1C2951')
plt.show()
```

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em; color: #1a3a6b; margin-top: 0.5em;"}
Facebook credit: **50 → 420** depending on model chosen.
:::

---

## Which Model Should You Use? {background-color="#F4F4F4"}

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Business Goal → Model**

- 🎯 Brand awareness → **First-touch**
- 💰 Direct conversion → **Last-touch**
- ⚖️ Balanced view → **Linear**
- 🕐 Recency matters → **Time Decay**
- 🔁 Nurture + close → **Position-based**
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Advanced: Spend-Weighted**

Weight credit not just by position,
but by **how much was spent**
at each touchpoint.

::: {style="color: #1a3a6b; font-size: 0.85em; margin-top: 0.8em;"}
Channels that cost more
get held to a higher standard.
:::
:::
:::

---

## Takeaway {background-color="#F4F4F4"}

::: {style="text-align: center; font-size: 1.3em; margin-top: 1.5em; line-height: 1.6;"}
Attribution isn't a statistics problem.

It's a **business decision**.
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; font-size: 0.95em; color: #1a3a6b; margin-top: 1.5em;"}
The model you choose determines which channels
get budget next quarter.

Choose deliberately.
:::
